items.headline_ai: Saratoga Investment posts FY2026 NII of $2.32/share; AUM up 13.4%, NAV up 0.9% year-over-year
items.snippet: Saratoga Investment FY2026 NII was $2.32/share with AUM rising 13.4% to $1.11B; non-accruals remain low at 0.2% of fair value.

items.snippet: Saratoga Investment postpones its 2024 Annual Meeting to October 23, 2024, as the Company lacks sufficient shares for a quorum.
